debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ Set ↑A ∼ ↑(𝒫 A)

proof:
by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range
  exact val_image_one_one A
failed_attempts:
by
  have h1 := val_image_one_one A
  have h2 := range_val_image A
  apply Exists.intro (fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [←h2]; apply Exists.intro X rfl⟩)
  apply And.intro
  · intro X1 X2 h; apply h1; injection h
  · intro ⟨S, hS⟩; rw [←h2] at hS
    cases hS with | intro X hX =>
    apply Exists.intro X; apply Subtype.eq; exact hX

by
  rw [equinum_def]
  exists fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X; rfl⟩
  apply bij_def.mpr
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro Y
    have h : Y.val ∈ range (val_image A) := by rw [range_val_image A]; exact Y.property
    cases h with | intro X hX =>
    exists X
    apply Subtype.eq hX

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range_of_one_to_one
  apply val_image_one_one

by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X; rfl⟩
  exists f
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro Y
    have h : Y.val ∈ range (val_image A) := by rw [range_val_image A]; exact Y.property
    cases h with
    | intro X hX =>
      exists X
      apply Subtype.ext
      exact hX

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_to_range
  apply val_image_one_one

by
  apply equinum_def.mpr
  exists (fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X⟩)
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    injection h
  · intro Y
    have h : Y.val ∈ range (val_image A) := by rw [range_val_image A]; exact Y.property
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := h
    exists X
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hX

by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X; rfl⟩
  exists f
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    injection h
  · intro Y
    have h : Y.val ∈ range (val_image A) := by rw [range_val_image A]; exact Y.property
    cases h with | intro X hX =>
    exists X
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hX

by
  apply equinum_of_one_to_one_onto (fun X => ⟨val_image A X,
    by rw [← range_val_image A]; exact ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩)
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    injection h
  · intro Y
    have h : Y.val ∈ range (val_image A) := by rw [range_val_image A]; exact Y.property
    cases h with | intro X hX =>
    exists X
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hX

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply Exists.intro (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩)
  apply And.intro
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro ⟨Y, hY⟩
    cases hY with
    | intro X hX =>
      apply Exists.intro X
      rw [← hX]

by
  rw [←range_val_image A]
  exists fun X => ⟨val_image A X, X, rfl⟩
  apply and_intro
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    injection h
  · intro ⟨_, X, hX⟩
    exists X
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hX

by
  exists (fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X⟩)
  apply and_intro
  · intro X1 X2 h; apply val_image_one_one A; injection h
  · intro ⟨Y, hY⟩; rw [← range_val_image A] at hY; cases hY with | intro X hX =>
    exists X; apply Subtype.eq; exact hX
successful_attempts:
by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range
  exact val_image_one_one A

by
  let f : Set A → ↑(𝒫 A) := fun X ↦ ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X⟩
  exists f
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro Y
    have h : Y.val ∈ range (val_image A) := by rw [range_val_image A]; exact Y.property
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := h
    exists X
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hX

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range
  apply val_image_one_one

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range
  apply val_image_one_one

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range
  apply val_image_one_one

by
  apply Exists.intro (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X⟩)
  apply And.intro
  · intro X1 X2 h; apply val_image_one_one A; apply congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro ⟨Y, hY⟩; rw [← range_val_image A] at hY
    cases hY with | intro X hX => exists X; apply Subtype.eq hX

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  exists (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by exists X⟩)
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro Y
    cases Y.property with | intro X hX =>
    exists X
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hX

by
  have h1 := val_image_one_one A
  have h2 := range_val_image A
  exists (fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply h1
    injection h
  · intro ⟨S, hS⟩
    rw [← h2] at hS
    cases hS with | intro X hX =>
    exists X
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hX

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range
  apply val_image_one_one

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range
  apply val_image_one_one

  apply equinum_range
  apply val_image_one_one

  apply equinum_range

  apply equinum_range
  apply val_image_one_one

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range
  apply val_image_one_one A

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  exact equinum_range (val_image_one_one A)

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  exact equinum_range (val_image_one_one A)

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range
  apply val_image_one_one

by

  apply equinum_range

by
  exists (fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X⟩)
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro ⟨S, hS⟩
    rw [← range_val_image A] at hS
    cases hS with | intro X hX =>
    exists X
